member.summary: Virtual ShankMaterial loaded from shank_material_id field

member.summary: Converter DLLs must implement this interface

member.name: M:HSMAdvisorDatabase.ToolsPluginInterface.ImportTools
member.summary: Read File and return a new ToolDataBase.DataBase object that is then internally merged in to the existing database

member.summary: Write ToolDataBase.DataBase into File

member.summary: Modify HSMAdvisor Database

member.summary: Root element matching DataSet XML format: <NewDataSet>

member.summary: Get a license key for a specific product

member.summary: License key matching DataSet table row format

member.summary: Represents the root element of the license API response

member.summary: Represents the response element containing license information

member.name: P:HSMAdvisorDatabase.ToolDataBase.Tool.Toolangle
member.summary: Convenience method used for getting/setting tool angle in the selected mode. When using make sure that ToolAngle_mode is set to the desired mode first!

member.name: P:HSMAdvisorDatabase.ToolDataBase.Tool.Tool_type_id
member.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the tool type. Saved in name_id field for historical reasons.

member.summary: Create a carbon copy of the Tool

member.name: M:HSMAdvisorDatabase.ToolDataBase.DataBase.DeleteTool(HSMAdvisorDatabase.ToolDataBase.Tool)
member.summary: Delete tool and all its cuts from the database

member.summary: Delete tool and all its cuts from the database

member.summary: Safely add Custom SFM to the Database. Exact Dublicates will be discarded!

member.summary: Add Library to DB. Name must be unique

member.summary: Get exact CustomSFM item with exactly the same parameters

member.summary: Get exact CustomSFM item with exactly the same parameters

member.name: M:HSMAdvisorDatabase.ObjectExtensions.Copy``1(``0)
member.summary: Create a shallow copy of an object

member.name: M:HSMAdvisorDatabase.Parse.StringToEnum``1(System.String,``0)
member.summary: Converts the specified string representation to the corresponding enumeration value of type T. Returns a default value if the conversion fails.
member.remarks: If the specified string does not match any value of the enumeration type T, the method returns the provided default value instead of throwing an exception.
member.typeparam: The enumeration type to convert to. Must be a value type that is an enumeration.
member.param: The string representation of the enumeration value to convert. The comparison is case-insensitive.
The value to return if the conversion is unsuccessful.
member.returns: The enumeration value of type T that corresponds to the specified string, or the specified default value if the conversion fails.

member.name: M:HSMAdvisorDatabase.Parse.StringToEnum``1(System.String)
member.summary: Converts the specified string representation of an enumeration name or value to its corresponding enum value of type T, ignoring case. Returns null if the conversion fails.
member.typeparam: The enumeration type to convert to. Must be a value type that is an enum.
member.param: The string representation of the enumeration name or value to convert. The comparison is case-insensitive.
member.returns: The enum value of type T that corresponds to the specified string, or null if the string does not represent a valid value of the enumeration.

member.name: M:HSMAdvisorDatabase.Parse.IntToEnum``1(System.Int32,``0)
member.summary: Converts an integer value to its corresponding enumeration value of type . Returns a specified default value if the integer does not map to a defined enumeration member.
member.remarks: This method is useful for safely converting integer values to enumeration types when the input may not always be valid. If does not match any defined member of , the method returns instead of throwing an exception.
member.typeparam: The enumeration type to convert to. Must be a value type that is an enumeration.
member.param: The integer value to convert to an enumeration member.
The value to return if does not correspond to a defined member of .
member.returns: The enumeration value of type that corresponds to if defined; otherwise, .

member.name: M:HSMAdvisorDatabase.Parse.IntToEnum``1(System.Int32)
member.summary: Converts an integer value to its corresponding enumeration value of type T. Returns the default value of T if the integer does not map to a defined enumeration member.
member.remarks: Use this method to safely convert an integer to an enumeration value without throwing an exception if the value is not defined in the enumeration. This method is useful when parsing or deserializing values that may not always be valid members of the target enum.
member.typeparam: The enumeration type to convert to. Must be a value type that represents an enum.
member.param: The integer value to convert to the enumeration type T.
member.returns: The enumeration value of type T that corresponds to the specified integer. Returns the default value of T if the integer does not match a defined member of the enumeration.

member.name: M:HSMAdvisorDatabase.Parse.EnumToInt(System.Enum)
member.summary: Converts the specified enumeration value to its underlying integer representation.
member.remarks: This method returns the integer value associated with the enumeration member, based on its underlying type. If the enumeration uses a non-int underlying type (such as byte or long), the value is converted to an int, which may result in data loss for large values.
member.param: The enumeration value to convert. Must be a valid instance of an enumeration type.
member.returns: The integer value corresponding to the underlying value of the specified enumeration.
